class.name: GDKTitleStorageBlobMetadataResult
class.brief_description: Paged Xbox Services Title Storage metadata result.
class.description: Holds a native Title Storage metadata result handle and exposes translated metadata items.

method.name: has_next
method.description: Returns whether another page can be requested.

method.name: get_storage_type
method.description: Returns the storage type used for this query.

method.name: get_blob_path
method.description: Returns the blob path prefix used for this query.

members.member: Storage type used for this query.
Blob path prefix used for this query.
